# Feature Request

## Problem

A short description of what you need the collector to do, and why.
What workflow does this unblock? What cost (operational, license,
support) does the current workaround have?

## Proposed Solution

How should the collector behave? Be specific:

- New vendor? Which one, and which MIB / OIDs / SSH commands are
  needed?
- New data source? Which protocol, which fields?
- New operator-facing surface? (subcommand, env var, metric, log
  field)

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why is the proposed
solution better?

## Acceptance Criteria

Concrete, testable conditions. (e.g. "after this lands, I expect
`firewall-collector --version` to show vendor list, and I expect
the audit report at the bottom of the README to show coverage for
the new vendor.")

## Out of Scope

What is explicitly NOT in this request. (Helps scope the PR.)

## Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I'd like to implement this myself — please assign me.
- [ ] I can test / review a PR for this.
- [ ] I just need it; someone else can implement.
